历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023, the lowest rank for science was approximately 212; in 2024, approximately 161; in 2025, approximately 131 for physics category. Over the past three years, the rank has continuously moved forward (decreasing numbers), with a cumulative forward shift of about 81, indicating intensifying competition. The baseline rank for 2025 is approximately 131. The enrollment plan for this university in Ningxia for science/physics category: 5 in 2023, 5 in 2024, 3 in 2025, 3 in 2026. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with no expansion or reduction, thus no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 17th (stable at 17-19 in recent years), belonging to the top tier of national universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and campus safety incidents, but these are isolated cases and the university has handled them promptly. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 44th (relatively hot), indicating medium-high attention on short video platforms, reflecting considerable application interest. There is no historical record of significant admission gaps. It has 9 A+ disciplines including Law A+, Theoretical Economics A+, Applied Economics A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Sociology A+, Statistics A+, Business Administration A+, Marxist Theory A+, and Chinese Language and Literature A+, as well as 15 disciplines rated A- or above, making it nationally top-tier in humanities and social sciences.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Renmin University's advantageous major categories such as Law, Finance/Finance/Economics is in a range from divided observation to recommendation, with overall application willingness being stable. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Ningxia college entrance examination is approximately 66,000 (slightly up from 65,897 in 2025), with an estimated 44,550 in the physics category, a slight increase from 44,491 in 2025, leading to a minor intensification of competition. Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, and its enrollment in Ningxia is very small (12 students in Ningxia in 2025, accounting for about 2% of the national total), making it a cross-province enrollment, where regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward shift in rankings over the past three years, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the slight increase in the total number of candidates in Ningxia, and the somewhat negative reputation, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 131. The predicted minimum rank is approximately 136, with a range of 89-184.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- No other physics category enrollment majors.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your rank is within the predicted range (89-184), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a stretch and Tier 3 as a safety. If your rank is significantly better than the lower bound of the range, you can prioritize sprinting for the flagship majors of Artificial Intelligence and Statistics.
